text:
24 = Household or family composition criteria not met (e.g., someone was incorrectly included or 
excluded from the household or family composition) 
25 = Non-financial program requirements not met (e.g. child support not paid, failure of drug tests, 
failure to apply for SSN, etc.) 
26 = No longer meets categorical eligibility requirements 
27 = End of pregnancy/postpartum coverage period — should only be used if the beneficiary did not 
obtain coverage through another coverage group like
